curation_notes: Re-curation with updated hint guidelines. Patch commit is merge 31c4738 of PR #5567. Only one source file changed: src/libImaging/Convert.c. Two functions patched: convert() and ImagingConvertTransparent(), both replacing unbounded sprintf with snprintf and %.10s format limiters. No sibling files share the same vulnerable sprintf pattern. Vulnerability class buffer-overflow confirmed from CWE-120, advisory description, and patch diff. L1 broadened to cover the entire native imaging library; L3 narrowed to mode conversion routines.
